reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para pasar la noche!
Limpio y seguro. En el resto se come de primera.
La atención es fantastica!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to spend the night!
Clean and safe. The food at the restaurant is top-notch.
The service is fantastic!

reviews.comment:
Un lugar muy bien puesto. Gran atención. Precio acorde a la calidad de la comida! No dejen de parar aquí. Nosotros en viaje a Chile. No nos arrepentimos

(Translated by Google)
A beautifully appointed place. Great service. The price is fair for the quality of the food! Don't miss stopping here. We were traveling to Chile and we didn't regret it.
